visual_description: A man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark shirt, is seated inside a vehicle, looking upward and slightly to his right. Another person, partially visible and wearing a dark top, is positioned close to him, holding his chin with their hand. The interior of the car is dimly lit, with the man’s face showing visible sweat and his gaze directed toward the other person.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and a fast pace, accompanied by heavy breathing and a gasp.
